description: Order sent to the community of Fustat from the office of Yehoshuaʿ Nagid (b. ca. 1310–d. 1355) recommending the elder Shemuel for charity, followed by requests and prayers on verso written in a different handwriting. (Information from a note on Goitein's typed text)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-14. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
